_comment: Project Claude Code config. STRICT JSON — no // comments; use _comment keys. Conservative by default. TODO: tune permissions and hook matchers for your stack. Machine-specific overrides go in settings.local.json (gitignored).
_comment_permissions: allow = run without asking; ask = prompt every time; deny = never (deny wins over allow). Start tight and widen as you trust a workflow. These patterns are examples — adjust to your tooling.

permissions._comment_deny: Note: curl|sh and other remote-exec pipes can't be expressed as permission rules (mid-command pipes aren't matchable); the pretool-block-dangerous-bash.sh hook handles those.

_comment_hooks: Deterministic guardrails. Paths are relative to the project root. Keep these fast and fail-safe (see docs/workflows/hook-policy.md). TODO: confirm matchers fit the tools you actually use.
